title: 秋華賞の後に・流石で、当然！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet wins against Vodka in the Shuka
Sho, but she still isn't satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka challenges her to a rematch at the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She accepts and watches Vodka leave, vowing to
beat her rival once again.
